rationale: The 2009 paper cites Ahluwalia, Rao, and Burnkrant (2001) mainly to define spillovers and to list prior evidence of spillovers across attributes within a brand. The citation appears in background/literature enumeration alongside several other references, without a distinct discussion of its commitment mechanism or findings. The cited work is not used to build specific hypotheses, operationalization, or model components in the focal paper.
